basics.name: Alexandre Vanryssel
basics.label: Freelance Tech Lead, Java, JS & Web3
basics.summary: Tech Lead with over 15 years of experience, specializing in Java and Spring Boot, distributed architectures, and mission-critical products for major accounts (retail, finance). Technical team leadership, recruitment, architecture design, and support for quality, security, observability, and operations policies. Additional expertise in DevOps and cloud (Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, Azure, CI/CD) and blockchain (Ethereum, Tezos, Avalanche, Sui, smart contracts).

work.name: Adeo
work.summary: Adeo via Astek (until Feb. 2025), then freelance.
highlights: Technical leadership of a team of around 10 on costing products. Architecture and design, cross-cutting policies (quality, security, observability), recruitment.
Development, CI/CD pipelines and operations
Tech: Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Neo4J, Angular, Vue.js, Kafka, Docker, Kubernetes, GCP, Github Actions, Github Copilot, Gatling, Datadog

work.name: Marigold
highlights: Management of the Ligo team (Tezos smart contracts), 12 people internationally. Language evolution tracking, library registry.

work.name: Ineat Lab (Ineat Group), then Innovation Lab (Astek)
highlights: Blockchain and AI referent: POCs, technology watch, training, RFP responses, articles and conferences. Teaching: blockchain lab supervision at Supinfo. RAG/GraphRAG studies, model benchmarking (Gemini, GPT, Llama, DeepSeek, Claude, Qwen).
Tech: React, JS/TS, Ethereum (Solidity), Tezos (Ligo), Python, Jupyter, Ollama, Neo4J, Vector Search

work.name: Norauto (via Ineat Group)

Tech: Java, Spring Boot, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Azure, Gitlab CI

work.name: Adeo (via Ineat Group)

certificates.name: Google Cloud Platform Fundamentals: Core Infrastructure

projects.name: Instampy.fr
highlights: Founder & architect, end-to-end product delivery. Cloud-agnostic anti lock-in architecture; multi-chain blockchain (Sui, Avalanche), Move/Solidity. Nuxt SSR, REST API, PostgreSQL/Prisma, Stripe, GDPR FR/EN. Railway, GitHub Actions, monitoring, DNS/DMARC/DKIM.
Tech: Nuxt 4, Vue 3, TypeScript, Node.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Prisma, Supabase, Railway, Sui, Avalanche, Stripe

projects.name: Tezos Projects
highlights: Tezocracy: online tool to help Tezos bakers vote on governance proposals. Development in collaboration with MIDL.dev. https://tezocracy.xyz/
Testnet faucet: personal project, Tezos Foundation funding, integration as official faucet, handover to OxheadAlpha and maintenance before transfer to the foundation.
Tech: React, Taquito, Tezos, GitHub Actions, Netlify
